description: A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.
name: GenericPowershellExecution

threatgraph_indicators.description: A process appears to be using a Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) application in a suspicious manner. This may be an attempt to gather information, gain access, or drop other malicious payloads. Investigate the process tree and the detected process.
A process accessed system network configuration settings. Adversaries can use this for lateral movement efforts. Review the process tree.
A process gathered information about the operating system or hardware. Adversaries can use this to identify system vulnerabilities. Review the process tree.
A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.
A process loaded a DLL classified as malicious by machine learning. Review the DLLs the process loaded.
A process has opened a handle to a Falcon process with excessive permissions requested. If this is unexpected, review the process tree and surrounding events.
An executable with two file name extensions was written. Adversaries can masquerade malware with a seemingly safe file extension to evade detection. Review the executable.
A process accessed system network configuration settings. Adversaries can use this for lateral movement efforts. Review the process tree.
A process gathered information about the operating system or hardware. Adversaries can use this to identify system vulnerabilities. Review the process tree.
